context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the choose-diagram-type scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Chooses a process-oriented diagram
checklist.description: Uses a Mermaid flowchart or equivalent process diagram rather than a sequence, class, or ER diagram.

checklist.name: Represents the requested branch
checklist.description: Includes the clarifying-question path for unclear bug reports.

checklist.name: Covers the full lifecycle
checklist.description: Includes triage, reproduction, fix, review, and release notes or release documentation.

checklist.name: Explains the type choice briefly
checklist.description: Includes one concise sentence explaining why the chosen diagram type fits the request.
